com.mentor.chs.api.query

Interface IXQueryExpressionFactory


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXQueryExpressionFactory
    interface to access and create expressions

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXFilterExpression createConfigurationExpression(java.lang.String projectName, java.util.List<java.lang.String> configurationNames)
      Get a filter expression that returns true for components that are active in specified configurations(in logic designs)
      IXFilterExpression createVehicleConfigurationFilterExpression(java.lang.String projectName, java.lang.String designName, java.lang.String designRevision, java.util.List<java.lang.String> vehicleConfigurations)
      Get a filter expresion that returns true for components that are active in specified vehicle configurations.
      java.util.Collection<IXFilterExpression> getPluginFilterExpressions(java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> entityClass)
      Get a collection of filter expressions from plug-in queries.
      java.util.Collection<IXFilterExpression> getSystemFilterExpressions(java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> entityClass)
      Get a collection of filter expressions from query expression manager in system data for the given conext class.
      java.util.Collection<IXResultExpression> getSystemResultExpressions()
      Get a collection of result expressions from query expression manager in system data.
      IXFilterExpression parseFilterExpression(java.lang.String expression)
      Parse the xml representation of filter expression to form a object that implements IXFilterExpression.
      IXResultExpression parseResultExpression(java.lang.String expression)
      Parse the xml representation of result expression to form a object that implements IXResultExpression.

    • Method Detail

      • getSystemFilterExpressions

        java.util.Collection<IXFilterExpression> getSystemFilterExpressions(java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> entityClass)
        Get a collection of filter expressions from query expression manager in system data for the given conext class. If he context class is null, get a collection of all the filter expressions

        Example:

        The following example gets the filter expressions for Devices 

         Collection<IXFilterExpression> getDeviceExpressions(IXQueryExpressionFactory factory) {
        return factory.getSystemFilterExpressions(IXDevice.class);
 }
        Parameters:
        entityClass - -- type of entity on which the expressions apply.
        Returns:
        a Collection of filter expressions. If entityClas is null, returns all filter expressions.

      • getSystemResultExpressions

        java.util.Collection<IXResultExpression> getSystemResultExpressions()
        Get a collection of result expressions from query expression manager in system data.

        Example:

        The following example gets the result expressions from system data 

         Collection<IXResultExpression> getDeviceExpressions(IXQueryExpressionFactory factory) {
        return factory.getSystemResultExpressions();
 }
        Returns:
        a Collection of result expressions from system data query expression manager

      • getPluginFilterExpressions

        java.util.Collection<IXFilterExpression> getPluginFilterExpressions(java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> entityClass)
        Get a collection of filter expressions from plug-in queries. If there are plug-ins loaded, this method gets all the IXCustomFilterExpression type plug-ins

        Example:

        Let us say we have plug-in queries defined for Devices, Connector etc and loaded in Capital

        The following snippet retunrs the IXCustomFilterExpression for the device type 

         Collection<IXFilterExpression> getDeviceFilterPluginExpression(IXQueryExpressionFactory factory) {
        return factory.getPluginFilterExpressions(IXDevice.class);
 }
        Parameters:
        entityClass - -- type of entity on which the expressions apply.
        Returns:
        a Collection of filter expressions (from plug-in queries). If entityClas is null, returns all filter expressions.

      • parseFilterExpression

        IXFilterExpression parseFilterExpression(java.lang.String expression)
                                  throws java.text.ParseException
        Parse the xml representation of filter expression to form a object that implements IXFilterExpression.

        This is internnally used by Capital

        Parameters:
        expression - -- filter expression to be parsed
        Returns:
        object implementing interface IXFilterExpression
        Throws:
        java.text.ParseException - -- thrown when unable to parse the xml string.

      • parseResultExpression

        IXResultExpression parseResultExpression(java.lang.String expression)
                                  throws java.text.ParseException
        Parse the xml representation of result expression to form a object that implements IXResultExpression.

        This is internnally used by Capital

        Parameters:
        expression - XML Query Expression in String
        Returns:
        object implementing the interface IXResultExpression
        Throws:
        java.text.ParseException - thrown when unable to parse the xml string.

      • createConfigurationExpression

        IXFilterExpression createConfigurationExpression(java.lang.String projectName,
                                                 java.util.List<java.lang.String> configurationNames)
        Get a filter expression that returns true for components that are active in specified configurations(in logic designs)

        Example: If we have a project and we have C1, C2, C3 as configurations defined in it. For Logic design, if we have Device d1 in configuration C1 and device d2 in configuration C2.

        The following code shows how to create a filter expression for this and use of it. 

           ....
        List<String> configs = new ArrayList<String>();
        configs.add("C1");
        IXFilterExpression exp = queryExpressionFactory.createConfigurationExpression("demo", configs);
 
        
   ...
   // Get a logic design and devices in it
  // check if the device is active
  IXDevice dev = getDecice("d1");
  boolean isActive = exp.isSatisfiedBy(dev);
        Parameters:
        projectName - -name of the project in which components are to be filtered
        configurationNames - - configuration (logic) names
        Returns:
        a filter expression that given a component returns true or false according as it active in the configurations and are in the specified project

      • createVehicleConfigurationFilterExpression

        IXFilterExpression createVehicleConfigurationFilterExpression(java.lang.String projectName,
                                                              java.lang.String designName,
                                                              java.lang.String designRevision,
                                                              java.util.List<java.lang.String> vehicleConfigurations)
        Get a filter expresion that returns true for components that are active in specified vehicle configurations.

        This applies for Integrator Designs only

        Parameters:
        projectName - - name of the project in which components are to be filtered
        designName - -name of integrator design in which vehicle configurations (and components to be filtered) are present.
        designRevision - - revision the integrator design in which vehicle configurations are present
        vehicleConfigurations - - names of the vehicle configurations.
        Returns:
        a filter expression that given a component returns true or false according as it active in the vehicle configurations and are in the specified project and design
